# PHIL.084 ? Consequentialism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** contemporary
**Subcategory:** consequentialism
**Domain:** CONTEMPORARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Moral value in outcomes; maximize good consequences; impartial consideration; aggregative ethics; forward-looking

## Application
Evaluate by results; maximize overall good; impartial perspective; consequential thinking; aggregate welfare

## Key Values
- Consequences
- Outcome maximization
- Impartiality
- Aggregate good

## Tags
philosophy, contemporary, consequentialism
